rationale: Section 48.268 governs commissioner adjustments for inter-district taxation disputes. A homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not implicate dispute resolution between districts or the commissioner's adjustment authority.
quote: The commissioner shall adjust the amounts due to a school district under this chapter and Chapter 46 as necessary to account for the resolution of a dispute or error involving the district and another district
_note: No direct conflict. The rule addresses inter-district taxation disputes, not homestead exemption amounts.
